_archived: 2026-06-25 — VCI paused. All Vercel crons removed to stop LLM spend and automation drift while the project is on ice.
_revival_instructions: To revive: copy the cron entries below back into a `crons` array in vercel.json and redeploy. Re-schedule the 4 pg_cron jobs (HN, GitHub, ProductHunt, GoogleTrends) via Supabase SQL.
